nasb.text: He has left His hiding place like the lion; For their land has become a horror Because of the fierceness of the oppressing sword And because of His fierce anger.”

esv.text: Like a lion he has left his lair, for their land has become a waste because of the sword of the oppressor, and because of his fierce anger.”

cnv.text: 他像獅子離開了洞穴， 他們的國土實在變成荒野， 因為欺壓人的刀劍， 和他猛烈的怒氣臨到他們。

ccb.text: 耶和华离开了祂的居所， 就像狮子离开了洞穴。 他们的土地因刀剑的蹂躏和耶和华的烈怒而一片荒凉。
